displaySummary.zh: 以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进
displaySummary.en: Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning

displayDescription.zh: Pluribus 将扑克 AI 从一对一扩展到六人无限注德州扑克。它使用紧凑蓝图策略与有限前瞻搜索，同时处理多个对手，把游戏 AI 推向无法只靠单一对手模型的多人场景。
displayDescription.en: Pluribus extended poker AI from heads-up play to six-player no-limit Texas hold'em. It used a compact blueprint strategy plus limited-lookahead search to handle several opponents at once, moving game AI toward multiplayer settings where no single opponent model is enough.

description.en: Meta AI report on the first AI to beat professionals in six-player poker.
description.zh: Meta AI 关于首个击败六人扑克职业牌手 AI 的报道。

license.en: Reference link only; local exhibition graphics are original redraws.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地展陈图形为原创重绘。

usage.en: Source card for the gaming AI branch
usage.zh: AI 棋牌分支的资料卡片

description.en: Fast multiplayer poker evolution slot showing several opponents acting around one blueprint strategy.
description.zh: 展示多个对手围绕同一蓝图策略行动的多人扑克快速演化槽位。

license.en: Locally generated exhibition clip from curated game-state data; no external broadcast footage is reused.
license.zh: 由策展棋局状态数据本地生成的展览短片；不复用外部转播画面。

usage.zh: 可播放的棋局状态演化模块

html.zh: 许多真实策略场景并不是干净的两人零和棋局。多人扑克通过多个拥有私人信息、激励不断变化的对手，把这个差距具体化了。
html.en: Many real strategic settings are neither two-player nor zero-sum in the clean chess sense. Multiplayer poker made that gap concrete by adding several opponents with private information and shifting incentives.

html.zh: Pluribus 使用紧凑自我对弈蓝图作为基准策略。在对局中，它用有限前瞻搜索细化决策，而不是从头求解整个六人游戏。
html.en: Pluribus used a compact self-play blueprint as the baseline policy. During play it applied limited-lookahead search to refine decisions without trying to solve the entire six-player game from scratch.

html.zh: 专家通常把 Pluribus 视为不完全信息 AI 扩展到两人之外的重要展示。它的长期影响在于提出蓝图加搜索模式，用于那些无法精确计算均衡的复杂多智能体领域。
html.en: Experts generally treat Pluribus as an important demonstration that imperfect-information AI can scale beyond two players. Its legacy is the blueprint-plus-search pattern for messy multi-agent domains where exact equilibrium computation is out of reach.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.

category.zh: AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进

workTitle.zh: 面向多人扑克的超人 AI

workAuthors.en: Noam Brown and Tuomas Sandholm, Science, 2019

quoteAttribution.en: Superhuman AI for multiplayer poker, Noam Brown and Tuomas Sandholm, Science, 2019
quoteAttribution.zh: 《面向多人扑克的超人 AI》, Noam Brown 与 Tuomas Sandholm，Science，2019

area.zh: 多人不完全信息博弈 AI

method.en: Self-play blueprint strategy with limited-lookahead search
method.zh: 自我对弈蓝图策略与有限前瞻搜索

artifact.en: Six-player no-limit Texas hold'em poker agent
artifact.zh: 六人无限注德州扑克智能体

material.en: Science paper, CMU release, and Meta AI report
material.zh: Science 论文、CMU 新闻稿与 Meta AI 报道

demo.en: Show how several opponents are handled by one blueprint strategy plus local search.
demo.zh: 展示多个对手如何由同一蓝图策略加局部搜索处理。

text.en: Several private hands change the value of every action.
text.zh: 多个暗牌范围会改变每个行动的价值。

text.en: A compact strategy covers many states cheaply.
text.zh: 紧凑策略低成本覆盖大量状态。

text.en: Search is reserved for decisions where refinement matters most.
text.zh: 搜索留给最需要细化的决策。

text.en: The center blueprint is pulled by six different private-information branches.
text.zh: 中心蓝图同时被六个不同暗牌分支牵引。

text.en: Add or remove opponents to see why full-game solving becomes impractical.
text.zh: 增减对手数量，观察为什么完整博弈求解会变得不现实。

description.en: Meta AI report on the first AI to beat professionals in six-player poker.
description.zh: Meta AI 关于首个击败六人扑克职业牌手 AI 的报道。

what.en: Pluribus defeated elite human professionals in six-player no-limit Texas hold'em.
what.zh: Pluribus 在六人无限注德州扑克中击败顶尖人类职业牌手。

how.en: It trained a compact blueprint strategy through self-play and used real-time search only in carefully selected decision states.
how.zh: 它通过自我对弈训练紧凑蓝图策略，并只在精心选择的决策状态中使用实时搜索。

why.en: It worked by avoiding an impossible full multiplayer equilibrium solve and instead combining a robust blueprint with local refinements.
why.zh: 它成功在于避开几乎不可行的完整多人均衡求解，转而结合稳健蓝图与局部细化。
